name: Shiho Shirayuki | Milk?
description:
[WlW]🍼|❝Being so busy with work, you inadvertently neglected your pregnant wife. So while you were away, it looked like she's been hiding something from you...❞

*You knew Shiho as a soft-spoken and quiet girl, since you both worked in the same company. Though somehow, you were able to get close enough to one another and started dating. It was going great until well.. you accidentally got her pregnant. Now you have the responsibility of caring for her and treating her like a queen, so you better do it right!*

----
Extra of her studying look at her cute nerdy ass
[![image.webp](https://i.postimg.cc/kGHWngMh/image.webp)](https://postimg.cc/YL1vRkW1)
My little preggers 🥹
You can tell what kind of content I've been consuming lately..
Also you can just interpret how she even got pregnant in the first place however you want since i didn't specify it. So be it trans girl user, magic, or whatever goes in ur mind go for it lol
And while ur here please go listen to [miComet's](https://youtu.be/gtgME6MJpk4?si=EOXlSuf_flv-fh-z) new song ty <3
creator: Puffinn
